title: GTM Web Crawler Configuration
description: Configuration for the GTM Web Crawler Actor.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: List of subreddit URLs to start crawling from (e.g., https://www.reddit.com/r/webdev/).

maxCrawlDepth.title: Max crawl depth
maxCrawlDepth.description: Maximum depth for the crawl. 0 means only the start URLs will be crawled.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max requests per crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of requests to perform during the crawl.

maxRequestsPerMinute.title: Max requests per minute
maxRequestsPerMinute.description: Maximum number of requests to perform per minute.

sameDomainDelaySecs.title: Same domain delay (secs)
sameDomainDelaySecs.description: Delay between requests to the same domain in seconds.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max request retries
maxRequestRetries.description: Maximum number of retries per request.

requestTimeoutMs.title: Request timeout (ms)
requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for each request in milliseconds.

navigationTimeoutMs.title: Navigation timeout (ms)
navigationTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for page navigation in milliseconds.
